title: Fragment
content:
Yes I will take a cheerful tone
    And feign to share their heartless glee,
    But I would rather weep alone
    Than laugh amid their revelry.
meaning:
Anne Bronte's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Fragment"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
